title: [InstCombine] visitShuffleVectorInst assert with vector of pointers fix.
summary:
The generalization transforms a specific bitcast-of-shufflevector pattern into a broader optimization by replacing a hardcoded calculation with a data-layout-aware size query. Originally, the code computed vector bitwidth using `getPrimitiveSizeInBits()`, which assumes a single, fixed primitive type. The patch replaces this with `DL.getTypeSizeInBits(SrcTy)`, which dynamically determines the total bit size based on the target data layout, accounting for padding or unusual element alignments.

This change decouples the optimization from assumptions about vector element packing, making it applicable to any vector type—including those with non-power-of-two elements or target-specific padding. Developers can apply this strategy by identifying similar fixed-size assumptions in other transforms and replacing them with data-layout queries, ensuring optimizations remain correct across diverse architectures and type configurations.
